views.captureInstructions: Select Image uploaders, then Imgur. Keep all values at their initial source state and close every ToolTip.

views.state: Text uploaders / PrivateBin / credentials ToolTip visible
views.captureInstructions: Select Text uploaders, then PrivateBin. Hover the credentials help target until its multiline ToolTip is fully visible.
Select File uploaders, then FTP / FTPS / SFTP. Use the initially selected account and do not focus a text field.

views.state: File uploaders / Amazon S3 / custom-domain ToolTip visible
views.captureInstructions: Select File uploaders, then Amazon S3. Hover the custom-domain help target until its multiline ToolTip is fully visible.
Select File uploaders, then Google Cloud Storage. Keep all fields at their initial source state and close every ToolTip.
Select URL shorteners, then bit.ly. Keep the navigation selection visible and do not focus a text field.
Open the pinned source revision and repository, then capture the initial workspace before changing revision, tab, splitter or tree selection.
Open a patient editor with the pinned fixture data and capture the initial tab, enabled state and source client size.
